channel.title: Bibhu Bhushan Sinha — Blog
channel.description: Notes on data engineering, Spark, Databricks and cloud platforms.

item.title: The Medallion Architecture, in Real Life
item.description: Bronze/Silver/Gold is a poster on the wall until you're on-call at 2am. Here's how I actually structure Databricks layers, ownership, and retries in production.

item.title: Step Functions vs Airflow for Data Pipelines
item.description: Two orchestrators, two very different philosophies. When I reach for AWS Step Functions, when I reach for Airflow, and the honest trade-offs.

item.title: A PySpark Performance Checklist I Actually Use
item.description: Skew, shuffles, broadcasts, AQE — the five things I check before touching cluster size when a PySpark job is slow.
